scripts.dev: nodemon --watch server.js --watch server-types.js --watch public --ext js,css,html,json server.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run check
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node -e "new Function(require('fs').readFileSync('public/app.js','utf8')); console.log('app.js syntax ok')" && node scripts/smoke-test.js
